**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Tuowei Technology (Chuzhou) Co., Ltd. presents a massive contradiction between its capital structure and its operational reality, revealing a highly strategic corporate shell. Originally registered in Beijing ('Fuying Optoelectronics') and relocated to Chuzhou, Anhui, it boasts a staggering paid-in capital of 150 Million RMB (264M RMB registered). Despite its stated business in 'Display Device Manufacturing' and this massive capitalization, it reports 0 insured employees for 2024. Its registered address ('Tuowei Office Building, Yuanshan Road') and corporate emails ('@topway-cn.com') link it to the broader 'Topway' group. The explicit inclusion of 'Non-residential real estate leasing' in its scope, combined with zero manufacturing workforce, confirms this is not a functioning factory. Instead, it is a heavily capitalized, dormant asset-holding shell or industrial real estate vehicle established by the parent group in the Chuzhou industrial zone.
